dogs.name: Buddy
dogs.description: A very happy retriever mix looking for an active family.
dogs.history: Found wandering near a park. Healthy and fully vaccinated.

dogs.name: Luna
dogs.description: Luna is a sweet little lap dog who loves snuggling.

messages.text: Hello! Is Buddy still available for adoption?
Yes, he is! When would you like to meet him?

guides.title: Basic Dog Training 101
guides.content: Start with simple commands like 'Sit', 'Stay', and 'Come'. Consistency and positive reinforcement are key. Remember to reward your dog immediately after they perform the desired action.

guides.title: Healthy Diets for Active Dogs
guides.content: Active dogs require a higher protein intake. Make sure you are choosing vet-approved foods that meet standard nutritional requirements.

rescues.description: Spotted a stray husky near the intersection, looks hungry but approachable.
